scope_summary.problem: requirements.md: add native posix module exposing POSIX system calls. The os module already exists and wraps these calls; posix is the lower-level interface.
scope_summary.success_criteria: posix module registered and functional: getpid(), getcwd(), getenv(), environ dict, uname(), plus re-exports of os operations (listdir, mkdir, remove, etc.). Unit tests pass. No regressions.

boundary.in_scope: New posix_mod.rs file, registration in stdlib/mod.rs, unit tests
boundary.out_of_scope: Modifying existing os_mod.rs, changing dispatch ABI pattern, platform-specific Windows support
boundary.constraints: Must follow os_mod.rs dispatch pattern (from_func). Must re-use os_mod implementations where possible. libc crate already available in Cargo.toml.
